Quality Education.reason: Provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with technical skills for employment (Target 4.4), aiming to 'enhance future competitiveness after entering society'.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is fundamentally about fostering innovation (Target 9.5) and upgrading technological capabilities within the audiovisual media industry using AI, XR, and interactive technologies.
